title: Bring the employee's registered email address to another table

posts.author: MarceloTorres (MarceloTorres)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to send an email to the person according to the process.
Her email address and that of her manager are registered in a table called Contacts.
I have a table where there is reimbursement for the employee. I want to be able to search for his and his manager’s email, which is in the Contacts box. How do I do this in the Refund section???

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marcelo,

Is it possible to share a screenshot so I can get some visual context to best assist you? It sounds like you’re like to pull an email column that exists in a seperate board, into your current board? If this is the case, you can use a mirror column to achieve this - I look forward to hearing from you!
